name: Bead Mosaic Fun
description: Bead Mosaic Fun is a popular bead puzzle game that offers a relaxing and enjoyable experience for players of all ages. Simply select the appropriately colored beads and place them onto the matching positions on the baseboard. Follow the reference image to fill in the pattern step by step until the entire design is complete.
instructions: Tap to select a bead then tap an empty spot to place it
